overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a sunlit dystopian urban environment. The clip transitions from a covered market walkway through narrow industrial corridors to open city streets with towering skyscrapers, neon signage, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with industrial backdrop

events.description: character stops leaning on railing and begins walking forward along the covered walkway
moving from open balcony area into narrow covered corridor

agents.ego_description: character initially leans on railing observing the industrial area below, then begins walking along the covered walkway

entered.detail: metal and fabric roof structure covering the walkway with green support beams
tall red and white striped smokestack emitting smoke in the background
tall palm trees visible beyond the railing against the industrial buildings
steam rising from a vent in the plaza below
red sports car parked in the open area below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered market walkway with a character leaning on a railing, overlooking an industrial plaza with steam vents and parked cars. The environment features tropical palm trees contrasting with gritty industrial architecture including a prominent smokestack. The character transitions from a static pose to walking as the camera moves toward a narrow corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with metal grating ceiling

events.description: enters narrow covered corridor with metal walkway and industrial doors
exits corridor through metal gate into open street area

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through narrow corridor with metal flooring and industrial walls

entered.detail: overhead metal mesh grating allowing some light through
metal security doors with control panels on the corridor walls
three colored recycling bins at the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow service corridor with metal grating overhead and industrial doors lining the walls. The lighting shifts to artificial as the enclosed space blocks the sky. The segment ends as the corridor opens to an outdoor area with recycling bins visible at the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with graffiti walls and distant skyscrapers

events.description: exits corridor onto sunlit city street with graffiti-covered walls
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: walking along sunlit city sidewalk passing graffiti walls and scattered pedestrians with towering skyscrapers in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top and red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
futuristic high-rise buildings with spires and antennas dominating the skyline
modern street lamp with orange accent on the pole
elevated transit lines and bridges crossing between buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a bright sunlit urban street with expansive views of futuristic skyscrapers. The camera follows a pedestrian along a sidewalk bordered by graffiti-covered walls. The environment transitions from enclosed industrial to open commercial with overhead transit rails visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with neon signage and vehicle traffic

events.description: brown SUV drives through the intersection from left to right
crossing the street at intersection while traffic light shows red for vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a busy intersection while observing passing vehicles and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: brown SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: orange street sign reading 'Goldsmith' mounted on a pole
bright red neon sign for 'SHOP' on a yellow building facade
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a busy urban intersection with visible street signage and active vehicle traffic. A brown SUV passes through the intersection as the character crosses the street. Bright neon signs contrast with the industrial architecture, and the Goldsmith street sign marks the location. The crowd density increases as pedestrians move through the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with overhead transit walkways

events.description: entering district with more industrial warehouse buildings and concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk past industrial warehouses and concrete buildings with occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning against the warehouse wall

entered.detail: large concrete warehouse building with loading docks and metal shutters
concrete planters and barriers along the building edge
elevated pedestrian walkway or transit structure spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an industrial warehouse district with large concrete buildings and minimal pedestrian activity. The character passes by a pedestrian leaning against a wall and continues along the sidewalk. Overhead transit structures and distant skyscrapers remain visible, maintaining the urban cyberpunk atmosphere as the walk continues down the sunlit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a gritty, covered industrial plaza into the expansive, sunlit streets of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a market walkway overlooking steam vents and palm trees before the camera follows a character into a narrow service corridor where natural light is replaced by artificial overhead grating. As the character emerges from this enclosed space, the scene opens into a bright urban environment featuring graffiti-covered walls and towering skyscrapers under a clear blue sky. The camera then navigates a busy intersection marked by the Goldsmith street sign, moving through active vehicle traffic and crowds of pedestrians amidst glowing neon signage. Finally, the movement shifts away from the commercial hub into a quieter industrial warehouse district, passing large concrete buildings while distant transit rails and skyscrapers remain visible on the horizon.
